text: You have permission to start over, to fall behind and get back up. Consistency is key, even if it's just 10 minutes a day. Every small win counts towards your goals. I'm still getting back into my gym routine after 2 months off.
decision_reason: High quality score and alignment with the audience's pain points

text: What's the smallest habit you can build today to move closer to your goals? Is it 5 push-ups, 1 page of reading, or 10 minutes of journaling? Start small, build consistency.

audience_fit.pain_point: knowing what to do but not doing it

decision_reason: High quality score, originality and alignment with the audience's desires

text: 3 things that will happen if you don't prioritize consistency: you'll lose motivation, you'll forget your goals, and you'll give up on your dreams. The cost of inaction is real. Staying motivated is a choice, and it's time to make it.
decision_reason: High quality score and effectiveness in conveying the importance of consistency
